{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the nonlinear program\n\\[\n\\min f(x) \\quad \\text{subject to} \\quad c_e(x)=0,\\quad c_i(x)\\ge 0.\n\\tag{19.59}\n\\]\nSuppose that \\(\\bar{x}\\) is feasible for \\((19.59)\\). Show that LICQ holds at \\(\\bar{x}\\) for \\((19.59)\\) if and only if LICQ holds at \\((\\bar{x},\\bar{s})\\) for \\((19.1)\\), where \\(\\bar{s}=c_i(\\bar{x})\\)."}
